_comment: Polyphemus (Alpha Centauri A b) named-moon system from Avatar: The Game [GAME, soft-canon]. Run: run.py --system alpha_centauri --hypotheticals hypotheticals/alpha_centauri.json --acen-a-au 1.6 --acen-e 0.1 --acen-incl-deg 16 --integrator ias15 --years 1000. The wiki gives NO semi-major axis/period/eccentricity for any moon (only Pandora is Kepler-derivable from its tidal-lock 27h day); orbital elements below are DESIGNED to satisfy the canon ordering + physical bounds (Roche inner edge, 0.5 R_Hill prograde outer limit) and verified for dynamical stability. Masses/radii for Dante/Hades/Cassandra/Chaos are also invented (only Pandora and Cassandra's >6500 km diameter are canon) — class C/D Phase 4 art-direction, staged, DB unchanged.

bodies.name: Dante
bodies._design_note: Canon [GAME]: innermost moon, orbits 'as close as possible without being torn apart' (Roche edge) with perpetual volcanism + moonquakes from Polyphemus tidal forces. a=100,000 km sits just outside the ~94,000 km fluid Roche limit (rocky rho=3) -> the canonical Roche-edge placement. STABILITY: a heavy (7e22) Dante mutually pumps Hades into a crossing ejection; reduced to a small inner MOONLET (8e21 kg, r 900 km) like Jupiter's inner moonlets (Metis/Adrastea) that coexist with Io — so it no longer pumps Hades. Roche-edge tides keep it volcanic regardless of size. e=0.01, mass/radius INVENTED.

bodies.name: Hades
bodies._design_note: Canon [GAME]: 2nd moon on an ELLIPTICAL orbit that 'brought it close to Dante', tidal-heated to T>900 K. STABILITY FINDING: the literal grazing orbit (e=0.30, periapsis crossing Dante) ejects within 100 yr; even e=0.13 with heavy moons mutually pumps to a crossing ejection (Lyapunov 0.2 yr). Tidal heating comes from a *maintained* eccentricity (Io's forced e is only 0.0041, yet it is the most volcanic body known), so e=0.05 amply sustains >900 K without crossing. Made a small moonlet (5e21 kg, r 750 km) at a=135,000 km (period ratio 1.57 to Dante, between the 3:2 and 5:3 resonances). periapsis 128,250 km clears Dante's apoapsis; apoapsis 141,750 km clears massive Pandora. mass/radius INVENTED.

bodies.name: Pandora
bodies._design_note: Avatar canon: the 5th moon, Na'vi homeworld. mass 0.72 M_earth (4.30e24 kg), diameter 11,447 km (r 5724 km). Tidally locked -> 27 h day = orbital period -> Kepler back-out around 120 M_earth Polyphemus gives a=225,000 km (Polyphemus ~31-36 deg across Pandora's sky, the films' skyline). ~0.02 R_Hill, deep inside the Domingos+2006 ~0.5 R_Hill limit. inclination relative to Polyphemus's orbital plane (canon axial tilt 29 deg is the spin axis, not the orbit).

bodies.name: Cassandra
bodies._design_note: Canon [GAME / Lightstorm 2024 panel]: the 2nd-largest moon (after Pandora), diameter >6500 km, with a N-H atmosphere + few % CO2 (possible carbon-cycle life). radius 3400 km (diameter 6800 km, satisfies >6500) at Pandora-like rho 5470 kg/m3 -> mass 9.0e23 kg. a/e/inc INVENTED: placed outer (beyond Pandora), well inside 0.5 R_Hill.

bodies.name: Chaos
bodies._design_note: Canon [GAME]: orbits beyond Cassandra; a fractured Miranda-like moon with 15-30 km cliffs (likely past tidal heating). Small (Miranda r=236 km); r 400 km at fractured rho~2 g/cc -> 5.4e20 kg. a=1.5e6 km, e=0.10, inc 5 deg INVENTED; still well inside 0.5 R_Hill (~5.1e6 km). The 9 unnamed moonlets + the heliocentric Poly-L4/L5 co-orbital planetoids are NOT in this run (separate, later).
